source: VNGGames Game Publishing Platform (GPP) Confluence — curated overview

company.name: VNGGames
company.summary: VNGGames is the game-publishing arm of VNG Corporation: it publishes and operates games across Vietnam, Southeast Asia, and select global markets. It runs both self-published titles and licensed/channeled titles on behalf of game studios, and operates a large MMORPG portfolio plus FPS, sports, and casual titles.
company.operating_model: VNGGames provides the publishing platform, live-operations, payments, customer support, marketing, and data so that Game Studios (GS) can focus on the game. Leaders here own publishing P&L, live-ops performance, monetization, retention, and player experience across the portfolio.
company.audience_note: This assistant serves VNGGames leaders and operators (live-ops, monetization, product, data, business). Use their vocabulary: titles, studios (GS), markets (VN / SEA / Global), and the platform products below.

platform.name: Game Publishing Platform (GPP)
platform.summary: GPP is VNGGames' unified suite of products that publish and operate every title. It is organized into domains, each owning part of the publishing stack — identity, payments, engagement, support, segmentation, and data. The internal goal is a single platform (Nexus) servicing 75+ titles across ~8 domains.

domains.name: Nexus
domains.what: The single internal platform / entry point that unifies all GPP tools for VNGGames teams and Game Studios: access management (AM2 / permissions), ticket management, approval flows, notification orchestration (email & Zalo OA), and a game-launching checklist. Holds GPI (Game Product Info) as the single source of truth synced across mini-apps (GDS, Play, Pay, Launch, Grow).
domains.for_leaders: When a leader says 'on Nexus' / 'the platform', they mean this self-service hub. Most other products are migrating their operation tooling into Nexus.

domains.name: Level Up
domains.what: The platform for exclusively operating MMORPG titles (12+ live titles such as the Võ Lâm Truyền Kỳ / Kiếm Thế / Thiên Long lines, Công Thành Chiến, Phong Thần). Provides a studio self-service CMS (update content, create events, send notifications), studio performance dashboards, and game code distribution/redemption.
domains.for_leaders: Drives in-game MAU/MAD growth for the MMORPG portfolio. 'Play' / 'Level Up titles' refers to these games.
domains.data_note: Per-title KPIs for these games (active, retention, recharge) are queryable in this workspace via the per-game cubes.

domains.name: VGA (VNGGames Account)
domains.what: The player identity / account backbone: login & SSO, One Passport System (centralizing DC-Form PII profiles), Account Center 2.0 (unified experience for Zing and VGA users across id.zing.vn and myaccount.vnggames.com), Sign-In-With-Apple (SIWA) management, SMS/OTP, and consent management (PDPL 2025).
domains.for_leaders: The canonical player identity. Game UID resolves to a VGA ID; cross-product player joins (CS, Club, Promotion) hang off VGA.

domains.name: Club
domains.what: The cross-title loyalty & engagement web product (Club page, Code redemption, Gift redemption). Targets ~200K MAU loyalty members, runs GameFest-style campaigns, member tiers, and is building VIP Management (VIP segmentation by behavior/spend, 1-1 and 1-n communication).
domains.for_leaders: Loyalty / retention lever that spans titles. Metrics leaders cite: Club MAU/DAU, redemption success rate, tier counts.

domains.name: CS Platform (VNGGames Support)
domains.what: Centralized customer-support tooling: tickets & tasks across channels (Facebook, Discord, Zalo OA, TikTok, WhatsApp/Line, web portal), AI-assisted support via the GiGi vendor (ticket labelling, response suggestions, sentiment), a User Master Profile (UMP), and VIP conversation. Strong PII-compliance focus.
domains.for_leaders: Owns first-response time, SLA, ticket volume, and 'AI Jobs Done'. CS data feeds support analytics.
domains.data_note: CS ticket data is available in this workspace (cs_ticket); joining tickets to a game UID is partial — page-scoped Facebook/AIHelp identities often cannot be resolved to a game account.

domains.name: Pay
domains.what: The payment & webshop systems for IAP and out-of-store web shop across markets (VN, SEA, US, TR). Integrates many payment methods (Google/Apple Pay, PayPal/Coda, Adyen cards, Payermax, ZaloPay, ZingCard, direct billing gateway), runs fraud protection (reCAPTCHA, the SPP secure programme), vouchers/promotions, and operation tooling (OPTool / WSOT) migrating onto Nexus.
domains.for_leaders: Owns payment success rate, channel cost, and the IAP→webshop shift. Business metrics here: ARPPU, PU/NPU, revenue, channel-cost reduction.
domains.data_note: Revenue / recharge / payment KPIs are queryable per-game in this workspace (e.g. recharge and payment cubes).

domains.name: Apollo
domains.what: The user-analysis & engagement engine within the Grow domain: Live Segment (real-time segmentation), RFM segmentation, push-notification campaigns, in-app messaging, recurring notifications, and CDP profile integration. Delivers bulk notifications for other products (e.g. Club VIP).
domains.for_leaders: The CRM / segmentation lever — how players are grouped and reached. 'Apollo' or 'Live Segment' refers to this.

domains.name: Promotion
domains.what: The promotion / campaign platform: promo templates (e.g. Lucky Draw types), segment-based promotion customization, and self-serve promotion setup for Game Studios and the Ops team on Nexus.
domains.for_leaders: How live-ops campaigns and rewards are configured and run; increasingly self-served by studios.

domains.name: GDS (Game Data Studio)
domains.what: The data backbone. Mission: improve all VNGGames business processes (decision-making, reporting, marketing) using data. Runs the Monitoring Hub (real-time dashboard alerts, resolve-log), real-time and Tableau dashboards, and data import/export (migrating from the GDS Data Portal into Nexus).
domains.for_leaders: GDS is the source of the analytics in this playground. The per-game cubes and KPIs this assistant queries are built on GDS data.
domains.data_note: The Cube models this assistant queries are grounded on GDS-managed data.

glossary.meaning: The game developers/partners whose titles VNGGames publishes or operates; the platform's internal 'customers'.
Senior leadership / approval body that signs off strategy and major launches.
Centralized product-info record on Nexus, synced across mini-apps as the single source of truth for a title.
Notification/outbound channel used by Nexus and CS in Vietnam.
Apple login; VGA manages SIWA identity, incl. Apple Team ID migration between stores.
Legacy VNG account system (id.zing.vn) being unified with VGA in Account Center 2.0.

glossary.expansion: Vietnam Personal Data Protection Law (Decree 15/2020/ND-CP and 2025 updates)
glossary.meaning: The PII-compliance regime driving consent management across VGA, CS, Club, and Promotion.
Player-profile store feeding Apollo segmentation and VIP management.
CS-side unified player profile (history, Club, login by email/phone).
AI vendor powering CS automation (ticket labelling, response suggestions, analytics).
Store-billed purchases (Apple/Google); Pay drives players from IAP toward webshop to cut channel cost.

glossary.expansion: Web shop / Web Shop Operation Tool
glossary.meaning: Out-of-store web payment surface and its operation tooling.
Third-party payment processors integrated by Pay (Adyen, Payermax, Coda, etc.).
VNG prepaid-card payment method handled by Pay.

glossary.expansion: Avg Revenue Per Paying User / Paying Users / New Paying Users
glossary.meaning: Core monetization metrics leaders track on Pay and across titles.

glossary.expansion: Monthly Active Users / Monthly Active Devices
glossary.meaning: Top-line engagement metrics, e.g. Level Up's in-game MAU target.
Operations/admin tooling (e.g. Pay's OPTool) being consolidated onto Nexus.
User profile form for old channeling games, being centralized into the One Passport System (VGA).
